domain: Iroquois Haudenosaunee Confederacy Great Law of Peace (Northeastern North America, ca. 1102 CE): 6 nations united (Mohawk + Oneida + Onondaga + Cayuga + Seneca + later Tuscarora) under 50 chief Grand Council (per-nation quotas) — oldest representative democracy; Clan Mothers (eldest women) select chiefs + monitor performance + can remove chiefs failing to serve people; Faithkeepers oversee spiritual integrity; consensus required for major decisions; direct historical influence on US Constitution.
specific_mechanism: HAUDENOSAUNEE-6-NATION-50-CHIEF-CLAN-MOTHER-MATRIARCH-SUPERVISOR-CONSENSUS-CHIEF-REMOVAL-FAITHKEEPER-MULTI-AGENT-COMM: LLM multi-agent-comm mechanism with (1) 6-nation 50-chief sub-model council H_50: 50 sub-agent chiefs split across 6 nation-pools (per-nation quota); each pool contributes its quota; (2) clan-mother matriarch supervisor M_cm: per-pool meta-supervisor selects + monitors + can DEMOTE sub-chiefs whose contributions degrade performance; demotion → reweight/disable; (3) consensus decision gate K_cons: major decisions require >threshold consensus across 50 chiefs; below-threshold → discussion-round loop; (4) Faithkeeper integrity monitor F_keep: separate parallel agent monitors spiritual/safety consistency across sessions; flags violations independent of consensus; (5) chief-removal mechanism R_remove: degraded chief sub-agent identified by matriarch + faithkeeper → swapped for fresh sub-chief. Differs from R513 UMUNNA-KINDRED-SPOKESPERSON-2-TIER (2-tier kindred + spokesperson + low-bandwidth + umuada), R525 SABAR-BAKKS-TAMA-LEAD-CONVERSATION (bakks fixed-utterance + tama + polyrhythmic + ask-respond), R538 KGOTLA-MMUALEBE-OPEN-SPEAK-CHAIR-WRAP-UP (open-speak + chair-LLM + weak-voice + anti-polarization), R550 AYLLU-MOIETY-DUAL-3-TIER-AYNI-MINKA-MITA (2-moiety + 3-tier ayni/minka/mit'a + reciprocity + curaca + Sapa-Inca) by 6-nation 50-chief council + clan-mother matriarch supervisor + consensus gate + Faithkeeper integrity + chief-removal mechanism.
llm_application: HAUDENOSAUNEE-6-NATION-50-CHIEF-CLAN-MOTHER-MATRIARCH-SUPERVISOR-CONSENSUS-CHIEF-REMOVAL-FAITHKEEPER-MULTI-AGENT-COMM LLM mechanism + 6-nation 50-chief sub-model council H_50 per-pool quota + clan-mother matriarch supervisor M_cm select-monitor-demote degradation + consensus decision gate K_cons threshold-consensus discussion-loop + Faithkeeper integrity monitor F_keep parallel safety-consistency + chief-removal R_remove swap fresh sub-chief. Differs from R513 UMUNNA. R525 SABAR-BAKKS. R538 KGOTLA-MMUALEBE. R550 AYLLU-MOIETY-DUAL-3-TIER. Differs from Council Mode 2604.02923 + LLM Council + Council AI + Councils of Agents by 6-nation 50-chief + matriarch supervisor + consensus + Faithkeeper + chief-removal. Differs by 6-NATION 50-CHIEF COUNCIL + CLAN-MOTHER MATRIARCH SUPERVISOR + CONSENSUS DECISION GATE + FAITHKEEPER INTEGRITY MONITOR + CHIEF-REMOVAL MECHANISM.
novelty_claim: Council Mode 2604.02923 + LLM Council + Council AI + Councils of Agents cover multi-agent council + Chairman + consensus paradigm. HAUDENOSAUNEE-6-NATION-50-CHIEF-CLAN-MOTHER-MATRIARCH-CONSENSUS-FAITHKEEPER adds (a) 50-chief council + (b) matriarch supervisor + (c) consensus gate + (d) Faithkeeper integrity + (e) chief-removal mechanism. Recombination — borderline lookup.
